series_metadata.series_description: Gas utility regional report to the PUCO. Also includes reports filed by major gas companies for 5-10 year natural gas forecasts.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: permanently. ; Paper: scanned and image has been checked quality and completeness ; Electronic: system is determined obsolete
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Other
